bio: J. Renee is an entrepreneur, author, coach, speaker, and faith-driven strategist who empowers women of faith to break through limitations and maximize their potential in life and business. Through All Things J. Renee, she delivers speaking, coaching, and strategic guidance to corporations, women's leadership programs, faith-based communities, and entrepreneurial events. Her approach blends practical strategy, confidence building, and fearless faith to help women shatter glass ceilings and lead with purpose.
